name: Bacon and Egg Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until crispy and crumble it.
2. Coat a 9x12x2 inch casserole dish with vegetable spray.
3. Place the onion/garlic croutons in the casserole dish.
4. Pour the melted margarine over the croutons.
5. Sprinkle the unseasoned croutons evenly over the mixture.
6. Add the grated cheddar cheese and pour the milk, eggs, and mustard over all.
7. Sprinkle the bacon crumbs evenly over the top of the casserole.
8. Bake at 325 degrees F (165 degrees C) for 45 minutes.
9. Allow the casserole to stand for 15 minutes before serving.
Note: This recipe was posted by Grandma Sheila (Exner) in July 1991 and is courtesy of Shareware RECIPE CLIPPER 1.1.
